text: Author: jkois Date: Fri Aug 24 07:19:31 2012 New Revision: 39427 URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/39427 Log: PR: www/170607 Add Cloud BT IT Support from Australia to the list of consultants with FreeBSD support. Requested by: JJ Fiasson Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml ============================================================================== --- head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml Fri Aug 24 06:39:59 2012 (r39426) +++ head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml Fri Aug 24 07:19:31 2012 (r39427) @@ -225,6 +225,22 @@ + + Cloud BT IT Support + http://www.clue.com/ + + Cloud BT provides IT support and other IT services to businesses in + Australia, including system maintenance, data + recovery, and ongoing IT consulting. We also provide a range of + scalable cloud solutions to our business clients. In our day-to-day + operation we support numerous platforms including FreeBSD, Linux and + other Unix-based environments. Call us on 1300 737 205 or visit our + website for more + information. + + + Clue Computing, Inc. http://www.clue.com/ _______________________________________________ svn-doc-all@freebsd.org mailing list http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/svn-doc-all To unsubscribe, send any mail to "svn-doc-all-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"
